2994403.title: SpongeBob
2994403.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2994451.title: SpongeBob
2994451.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2994507.title: SpongeBob
2994507.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2994608.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2994608.description: Desperate to avenge last year's humiliating loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory.

2995277.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2995277.description: Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one himself. Just one problem, Alvin has to film Dave without him knowing.

2995310.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2995310.description: It's the big Bake-Off, and Eleanor has prepared her signature cake and left it out to cool. But Brittany and Alvin come home, and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Can they re-make the cake in time? Or will Eleanor's dreams be reduced to crumbs

2995352.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2995352.description: It's off to the races when Skipper agrees to give a day off from hard training to the first penguin who can bring him a kipper. // The penguins are determined to make opening day of their favorite action star's blockbuster movie!

2995437.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2995437.description: Private has to get over his fear of roaches and use them to help him free the other penguins from the grip of Officer X. // The penguins discover a kid on a field trip to the zoo has seen one of their covert missions.

2995475.title: Hier is Pony
2995475.description: Annie is worried that Dad will see Pony as useless to the farm and get rid of him. // Annie is set to play in the soccer game, but when she gets between Pony and Dog in a fight Pony accidentally stomps on her foot.

2996062.title: SpongeBob
2996062.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2996136.title: SpongeBob
2996136.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2996214.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2996214.description: Tired of Mom's terrible dinners, Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world. // The Turners win a contest to be the first family in space, only to learn that it was all a ruse by Dark Laser to imprison them in an alien zoo.

2996863.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2996863.description: When Jorgen comes down with the Trick-ups, it's up to Cosmo to enforce Da Rules.

2996908.title: The Loud House
2996908.description: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

2996945.title: Huize Herrie
2996945.description: Every April Fool's Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. // The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

2997003.title: De Casagrandes
2997003.description: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. // When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

2997083.title: De Casagrandes
2997083.description: Adelaide and Carl have an adventure on Mr. Chang's route, but can they work together to save the day? // When Mama Lupe comes to visit, Abuela tries to get her family at the top of their cultural game.

2997785.title: Breadwinners
2997785.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce sneak into a "girls only" summer camp in order to find the one and only Jenny Quackles. // The guys head to the beach and nothing is gonna ruin their day, not even a big scary M-M-M-M-MONSTER

2997837.title: Breadwinners
2997837.description: After wracking up a ton of tickets from Chief Rambamboo, SwaySway and Buhdeuce get sent to traffic school. // They discover an underground Food Fight Club, and they're gonna have to food fight to save their beaks!

2997907.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2997907.description: When simultaneous threats from the Purple Dragons and Baxter Stockman's mechanical Mousers force the Turtles to split into two groups, Donnie & Mikey must prove that their "B Team" is just as valuable as Leo & Raph's "A Team."

2997966.title: Dorg van Dango
2997966.description: It's Dorg's turn to look after the class hamster Zippy, but a series of magical mishaps lead the gang and the hamster into body-swapping chaos! // Dorg can't sleep. Patronella casts a spell to help him but puts all of Normill to sleep instead!

2998739.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
2998739.description: Captain Man & Kid Danger are tasked with driving to pick up 1,000 hot dogs for a birthday party. // To save Schwoz from an experiment gone wrong, Captain Man & Kid Danger must follow instructions he posted online, but first they need decent wifi.

2998798.title: The Loud House
2998798.description: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her.

2998845.title: Huize Herrie
2998845.description: Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

2998879.title: Huize Herrie
2998879.description: When all 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full.

2998933.title: City Adventures
2998933.description: Sanitation worker, Shirley Keeper loves her city, and wants to help the residents take care of it. The difficulty  is getting people to listen to her talk about garbage when countless distractions lurk around every corner.

2999627.title: City Adventures
2999627.description: Teenage superstar, Poppy Starr, visits her grandfather, Sargent Sam Grizzled.

2999665.title: City Adventures
2999665.description: Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

2999689.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2999689.description: Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic. Dad thinks he can talk to animals.

2999738.title: SpongeBob
2999738.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2999769.title: SpongeBob
2999769.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2999827.title: SpongeBob
2999827.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3000326.title: SpongeBob
3000326.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3000377.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3000377.description: When the penguins discover Skipper's idol, Rockgut, they fall under his paranoid spell. // Kowalski threatens to tear the space/time continuum with his time machine. He sends his future self to stop his present self from completing the time machine.

3000447.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3000447.description: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. It's up to Captain Man & Kid Danger to bring him back. // Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

3000512.title: De Casagrandes
3000512.description: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves! // After begging Abuelo for some A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

3001308.title: Huize Herrie
3001308.description: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

3001356.title: Huize Herrie
3001356.description: Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it - no matter what Lucy says.

3001396.title: Hier is Pony
3001396.description: When Pony celebrates a special day, Annie needs to figure out what's so special about it. // Pony finally gets to go to school with Annie when he's named class pet.

3001457.title: Hier is Pony
3001457.description: When Pony is accused of eating the park keeper's precious daisies, Annie needs to prove his innocence. // Everyone is raising money for charity, but Annie wants to find a cause that really needs her and Pony's help.

3001509.title: SpongeBob
3001509.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3002323.title: Dorg van Dango
3002323.description: It's Dorg's turn to look after the class hamster Zippy, but a series of magical mishaps lead the gang and the hamster into body-swapping chaos! // Dorg can't sleep. Patronella casts a spell to help him but puts all of Normill to sleep instead!

3002401.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3002401.description: Leonardo, tired of Raphael's constant criticism, lets his brother try his hand at leadership for a while. Meanwhile, Leonardo meets a beautiful and dangerous female ninja who tries to lure Leonardo to the dark side.

3002448.title: Breadwinners
3002448.description: Strap on your helmets and hold on to your tail feathers because SwaySway and Buhdeuce are delivering bread in space! // When Ketta crashes at the Swamp Pad, her home modifications drive the guys whoa-ma-gosh quazy.

3002518.title: SpongeBob
3002518.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3003299.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3003299.description: Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the beautiful Princess of England! Problem is, he has to convince Brittany he's worthy.

3003349.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3003349.description: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they saved the tree from being cut down, and made it their home.

3003389.title: The Loud House
3003389.description: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis. // When Lana brings home a new pet, who the kids adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

3003450.title: The Loud House
3003450.description: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. // Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

3004308.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3004308.description: Dad entrusts Timmy with washing and preserving his classic Stryker Z sports car!

3004379.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3004379.description: Vicky is determined to get a job after Timmy's parents fire her. // Timmy wishes up a girlfriend for Crimson Chin and soon the Chin dating a woman named Golden Locks except now the comic is both boring and romantic.

3004444.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3004444.description: An older weathered Raph battles road gangs in a post-apocalyptic mutant wasteland.

3004536.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3004536.description: As they roam the desert wasteland, the team searches for a mysterious hermit, who is the key to finding the mythical Oasis.

3005343.title: SpongeBob
3005343.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3005400.title: SpongeBob
3005400.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3005443.title: Ollie's Pack
3005443.description: When Ollie throws a pizza slice into his pack, a monster comes looking for revenge after his world is destroyed. // Ollie's insecurity gets him stuck in his dreams after summoning the Dream Wheezy to help him sleep.

3005505.title: The Loud House
3005505.description: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

3006313.title: De Casagrandes
3006313.description: When Ronnie Anne finds out her Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder, she begs him to teach her some new moves. // In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand.

3006372.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3006372.description: During a fight with Tong Fo, Po is struck by lightning, giving him the power to read minds.

3006425.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3006425.description: Thanks to Po, Hundun opens up his own noodle shop in the village, threatening to put Mr. Ping out of business.
